calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT JONATHAN TOWNLEY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SUBMIT EITHER PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING OR PROOF OF SERVICE. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
